headline: Pasta saves the Bruins while the Celtics collapse in a brutal Game 5
morning_brew: The Celtics looked like they were stuck in neutral in that fourth quarter against Philly. Scoring only eleven points in the final frame of a playoff game is absolutely brutal, especially when you had a chance to close it out at the Garden. Joel Embiid put up thirty-three points to keep the 76ers alive, and now we are heading back to their barn for the next one. Jayson Tatum had twenty-four points and sixteen boards, but the offense just vanished when it mattered most. We are chasing Banner 19, but playing like that makes it feel a long way off.

Thank goodness for David Pastrnak and Jeremy Swayman. The Bruins were on the ropes in Buffalo, but they clawed out a 2-1 overtime win to force this thing back to Boston. Jeremy Swayman was rock-solid with twenty-four saves, and Pastrnak finally found the back of the net when it mattered most in the extra period. This team has shown some heart after that embarrassing loss earlier in the week. We have six Cups in our history, and this group needs to keep that grit if they want to complete the comeback on Friday night.

Out in Toronto, the bats decided to take the night off. Four hits in nine innings is a recipe for a 3-0 loss every single time. Tolle struggled to find the zone and could not even make it through five innings, which is a tough way to follow up the momentum we had earlier in the week. The rotation is still a massive question mark, and the lineup is as inconsistent as the traffic on the Pike. We are 12-18 and need a major turnaround before we return to Fenway Park for the next homestand.

news_digest.headline: Joel Embiid's 33 downs Celtics in Game 5 to keep 76ers alive
news_digest.dans_take: Embiid is a problem we have to solve before the next game in Philly.

news_digest.headline: Bruins top Sabres in OT as Swayman, Pastrnak prove clutch
news_digest.dans_take: Pasta finally came through when our backs were against the wall.

news_digest.headline: Patriots players support Vrabel, stay focused on football
news_digest.dans_take: The guys are sticking by their coach while the noise gets louder outside.
